title: Arithmetic Operations
description: Basic addition of two integers and storing the result in a sum variable.

title: Circle Area & Perimeter
description: Calculate area and perimeter of a circle using floating point numbers and user input.

title: Circle Area & Perimeter (Functions)
description: Calculate area and perimeter of a circle using custom functions and user input.

title: Circle Area & Perimeter (Pointers)
description: Calculate area and perimeter of a circle using pointers to return multiple values from a function.

title: Circle Area & Perimeter (Full Pointers)
description: Comprehensive pointer usage: passing addresses for all parameters including the radius.

title: Reverse Number (Temp Variable)
description: Reverse digits of a number using a temporary variable and modulo operator.

title: Reverse Number (Pointers)
description: Use a pointer to modify the original number and reverse its digits.

title: Swap Numbers (No Pointers)
description: Demonstrates Call-by-Value where values are swapped inside the function but the original variables remain unchanged.

title: Swap Numbers (Using Pointers)
description: Demonstrates Call-by-Reference where pointers are used to directly modify the memory of the original variables.
